english translation text: Aai Ghairate Maryam Tera Baazar main jaanaO diginity of Marium (a.s), you are being taken through the BazaarEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Aai Ghairate Maryam Tera Baazar main jaana
@HujjatELC
english translation text: O diginity of Marium (a.s), you’re been taken through the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Kyun Zainabo Kulsum Ki chinti hai ridaa’eJao are logo mere bhai ko bulana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Why were the veils of Bibi Zainab (a.s) and Bibi Umme Kulsoom (a.s.) snatched,
O People! Please call our brother to help us

urdu transliteration text:
Jis Gharpe salaami diya kartethe payamberThero ai musalmano wohi ghar na jalana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The house at which the Prophet (pbuh) used to say Salam,
Stop O Muslim! Don’t burn that house

urdu transliteration text:
Too dukhtare Zehra hai nawasi hai kiBaazar me sar nange tera khutba sunana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You are the daughter of Zahra (s.a) and grand daughter of Prophet (s.a),
Despite this you were taken to the Bazaar as captives where you delivered a sermon

urdu transliteration text:
Neend aaye bhala kaise Sakina ko zamin parToone hi sikhaya isse sine pe sulana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How will Sakina (a.s.) sleep on the floor,
She is used to sleeping on her father’s chest

urdu transliteration text:
Islam pe do beton ko qurbaan kiya haiKismat me teri likha hai ye daag uthana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
For Islam Bibi Zainab (s.a.) sacrified both her sons,
She was destined to bear this great loss

urdu transliteration text:
Aai dukhtare Haider woh qayamat ki garithiSar nange tera shaam ke darbar me jaana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O daughter of Haider (a.s)! that moment was like the end of the world,
When you were taken to the court of Yazid in that state
